summary: Iteration 233 — S3 Motore AI Sicurezza Testing Complete. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including AI Precompila button, AI result banner, AI-populated fasi/rischi/DPI/misure/domande, soggetti pre-fill from company settings, Gate POS with blockers.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: session token BccyJvnOyrPXRRYy4GfxR5osuF51RWcYWWnUUoHx434, user_id user_6988e9b9316c. Existing cantiere cant_3894750ebe93 has AI results. Created test cantieri during testing which were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: S3 Motore AI Sicurezza fully working. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/ai-precompila calls GPT-4o via emergentintegrations, returns fasi_proposte, rischi_attivati, dpi_calcolati, misure_calcolate, apprestamenti_calcolati, domande_residue counts. (2) AI precompila saves results to cantiere document including ai_precompilazione metadata (timestamp, modello, sources_used, contesto_operativo, counts). (3) Rules engine expands fasi→rischi→DPI/misure/apprestamenti correctly via rischi_ids chain. (4) Gate POS recalculated with blockers for gate_critical domande. (5) Soggetti pre-filled from company_settings.figure_aziendali. (6) Frontend shows 'Pre-compila con AI' button in SchedaCantierePage header, AI result banner after precompilation, AI-populated data in all steps.
